issue_summary: A LineEntityProcessor which can stream lines of text from a given file to be indexed directly or for processing with transformers and child entities.
javadoc_before:
/** *

* A data source implementation which can be used to read character files using * HTTP. *

*

*

* Refer to http://wiki.apache.org/solr/DataImportHandler * for more details. *

*

* This API is experimental and may change in the future. * * @version $Id$ * @since solr 1.3 */
javadoc_after:
